episodes.title: From Inside the Cult to Total Freedom: One Woman’s Unfiltered Story
episodes.description:
Dive into the raw, unfiltered story of Elle, who escaped a controlling religious cult after years of extreme rules, surveillance, arranged marriages, and total isolation. From darkly funny moments inside to the terror of leaving with nothing—and the long road of healing, guilt, and rediscovering freedom—this conversation is equal parts shocking and inspiring. If you've ever questioned a high-control group or want practical advice for breaking free, you won't want to miss this. Grab a drink and join us on Shaken & Unfiltered.

00:00 From Inside the Cult to Total Freedom: One Woman’s Unfiltered Story
